document.title: FCC Test Report
standards: FCC KDB 558074 D01 15.247 Meas Guidance v05r02
FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01

sourceSummary.oneLine: FCC test report FR740701-19AC evaluates an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module against 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents FCC Part 15.247 transmitter test results for the EUT, including conducted emissions, radiated emissions, output power, 6 dB bandwidth, power spectral density, and antenna requirement results.
keyPoints: Report No. FR740701-19AC, Report Version Rev. 01, initial issue Nov. 28, 2023.
FCC ID is SQG-60SIPT; equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module; model ST60-SIPT is listed on the cover page.
Section 1.1 states the report is a duplicate report to original report no. FR740701AC, with modifications changing brand name and applicant.
Product details list ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, and SU60-2230C; ST60-2230C was selected as representative for final test and only its data was recorded.
Summary of test results shows Pass for conducted emissions, radiated emissions, maximum output power, 6 dB bandwidth, power spectral density, and antenna requirement.

entities.name: International Certification Corporation
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corporation, would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

concepts.name: Duplicate FCC test report
concepts.evidence: This report is issued as a duplicate report to original report no. FR740701AC. The modifications are changing brand name and applicant.

evidence.claim: Report FR740701-19AC is Rev. 01 and was initially issued on Nov. 28, 2023.
evidence.evidenceText: Release Record Report No. Version Description Issued Date FR740701-19AC Rev. 01 Initial issue Nov. 28, 2023

evidence.claim: The report covers FCC ID SQG-60SIPT for an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
evidence.evidenceText: FCC ID : SQG-60SIPT Equipment : 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module

evidence.claim: The cover page model number is ST60-SIPT.
The listed product models are ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird Connectivity ST60-SIPT ... SU60-SIPT ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The applicant is Laird Connectivity LLC, located in Cedarburg, Wisconsin, United States of America.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant : Laird Connectivity LLC Address : W66N220 Commerce Court, Cedarburg, WI 53012 United States Of America

evidence.claim: The tested standard is 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247.
The EUT must comply with 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247 and ANSI C63.10-2013 according to the test standards section.
evidence.evidenceText: According to the specification of EUT, the EUT must comply with following standards and KDB documents. 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247 ANSI C63.10-2013

evidence.claim: The report references FCC KDB 558074 D01 15.247 Meas Guidance v05r02 and FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01.
evidence.evidenceText: FCC KDB 558074 D01 15.247 Meas Guidance v05r02 FCC KDB 662911 D01 Multiple Transmitter Output v02r01

evidence.claim: The tested sample was declared evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the listed standards.
evidence.evidenceText: We, International Certification Corporation, would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: Summary results show Pass for conducted emissions, radiated emissions, maximum output power, 6 dB bandwidth, power spectral density, and antenna requirement.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary of Test Results ... Conducted Emissions ... Pass ... Radiated Emissions ... Pass ... Maximum Output Power ... Pass ... 6dB Bandwidth ... Pass ... Power Spectral Density ... Pass ... Antenna Requirement ... Pass

evidence.claim: Maximum output power result reported in the summary is 29.41 dBm.
evidence.evidenceText: 15.247(b)(3) Maximum Output Power Max Power [dBm]: 29.41 Pass

evidence.claim: The report was received Apr. 07, 2017 and tested Apr. 12 to May 10, 2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Received Date : Apr. 07, 2017 Tested Date : Apr. 12 ~ May 10, 2017

evidence.claim: The report states no deviation from test standard and measurement procedure.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.7 Deviation from Test Standard and Measurement Procedure None

evidence.claim: The testing facility was International Certification Corporation with FCC Designation No. TW0009 and FCC site registration No. 207696.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Laboratory International Certification Corporation ... FCC Designation No.: TW0009 FCC site registration No.: 207696

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is 'general', while the source text identifies FCC authority through FCC Test Report, FCC ID, and 47 CFR FCC Part 15.247.
Source metadata productSignal is 'Unclassified', while the source text identifies ST60-SIPT and related ST60/SU60 models.
The document is a duplicate report to original report no. FR740701AC with brand name and applicant changes; downstream use should distinguish duplicate report facts from original report facts.
Several detailed radiated/non-restricted emissions result pages appear in the preprocessed text mainly as headings, notes, or '---', limiting extraction of granular plot/table values.
